prompt: Show a simple mermaid diagram of the HTTP request lifecycle.

task.intent: Show a simple mermaid diagram of the HTTP request lifecycle.
task.current_step:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    Client->>Browser: 1. Request Formatted
    Browser->>Network: 2. Request Sent (TCP/IP)
    Network-->>Server: 3. Request Received
    Server->>Server: 4. Route & Resolve
    Server->>Server: 5. Execute Logic
    Server-->>Client: 6. Response Sent
    Client->>Browser: 7. Response Parsed
    Browser->>Client: 8. Response Rendered
```

pipelineSteps.label: Intake
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio captured the request and established the active artifact context.
outputs: Show a simple mermaid diagram of the HTTP request lifecycle.

pipelineSteps.label: Outcome routing
pipelineSteps.summary: The typed router chose the artifact branch intentionally.

pipelineSteps.label: Requirements
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio captured the requested scope, mutation boundary, and persistence contract.

pipelineSteps.label: Artifact spec
pipelineSteps.summary: Artifact class, renderer, presentation surface, and substrate are explicit.

pipelineSteps.label: Artifact brief
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio is grounding the request into a typed artifact brief before authoring can begin.

pipelineSteps.label: Skill discovery
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio is deciding whether this request should attach runtime guidance before authoring.

pipelineSteps.label: Planner
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio locked one canonical artifact plan and explicit worker scopes before authoring.

pipelineSteps.label: Adaptive work graph
pipelineSteps.summary: Scoped workers patched the same canonical artifact instead of drafting competing full candidates.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Worker receipts must retain bounded ownership and status.

pipelineSteps.label: Merge
pipelineSteps.summary: Deterministic patch gating and merge receipts reconciled worker output onto one artifact state.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Out-of-scope patches must be rejected before the artifact can advance.

pipelineSteps.label: Materialization
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio is creating the files or workspace required by the manifest.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Files or scaffold receipts must exist before the artifact can present.

pipelineSteps.label: Execution
pipelineSteps.summary: Single-file generation completed inside the selected renderer substrate.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Execution receipts must exist for every command-backed step.

pipelineSteps.label: Verification
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio routed this request to a visualizer surface. The prompt does not ask for a persistent artifact. Studio kept the artifact lane closed and preserved route receipts for downstream execution.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Render, build, preview, or export checks must pass before Studio can claim success.

pipelineSteps.label: Repair
pipelineSteps.summary: Repair stays bounded to cited judge or verification failures on the merged artifact.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Repair may patch only cited failures, not restart the artifact wholesale.

pipelineSteps.label: Presentation
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio is presenting only the artifact surfaces that currently exist.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Preview becomes primary only after verified render or preview health exists.

pipelineSteps.label: Verified reply
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio composes the user-facing summary from artifact state and verification.
outputs: Studio routed this request to a visualizer surface. The prompt does not ask for a persistent artifact. Studio kept the artifact lane closed and preserved route receipts for downstream execution.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Verification state, not worker prose, authorizes Studio replies.

notes: Studio intentionally kept this request off the artifact materialization path.
The shared execution envelope still records plan, worker, and verification state.
No renderer-specific fallback artifact was injected for this route.
